title: tovara filiformis
side_effects: Tovara filiformis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness and nausea in individuals with pre-existing heart conditions. Prolonged use of the plant's extracts can lead to kidney damage and increased risk of bleeding disorders. Some users may experience allergic reactions, such as itching, redness, and swelling, particularly if they have sensitive skin. Additionally, improper preparation and consumption of tovara filiformis can lead to respiratory issues, including shortness of breath and wheezing.
